ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., ground-based, satellite, radar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the data was collected from */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time the data was collected */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "precipitation_prob" REAL /* Precipitation probability in % */,
  "wind" TEXT /* Wind speed and direction */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in % */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover in % */,
  "fog" REAL /* Fog in % */,
  "low_clouds" REAL /* Low clouds in % */,
  "middle_clouds" REAL /* Middle clouds in % */,
  "high_clouds" REAL /* High clouds in % */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., weather station, satellite, radar) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data to track changes over time */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in W/m² */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture percentage */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Soil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth in mm */,
  "ice_cover" REAL /* Ice cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_cloud_cover FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_cover") REFERENCES cloud_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_fog FOREIGN KEY ("fog") REFERENCES fog_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wind FOREIGN KEY ("wind") REFERENCES wind_speeds ("speed_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_cloud_cover FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_cover") REFERENCES cloud_heights ("height_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_precipitation FOREIGN KEY ("precipitation") REFERENCES precipitation_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wind FOREIGN KEY ("wind") REFERENCES wind_directions ("direction_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_time" INTEGER /* Time the forecast is for */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Forecasted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Forecasted precipitation in mm */,
  "wind" TEXT /* Forecasted wind speed and direction */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Forecasted atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Forecasted relative humidity in % */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Forecasted dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Forecasted cloud cover in % */,
  "fog" REAL /* Forecasted fog in % */,
  "low_clouds" REAL /* Forecasted low clouds in % */,
  "middle_clouds" REAL /* Forecasted middle clouds in % */,
  "high_clouds" REAL /* Forecasted high clouds in % */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used for the forecast (e.g., GFS, ECMWF) */,
  "forecast_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecast to track changes */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Forecasted visibility in meters */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Forecasted solar radiation in W/m² */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* Forecasted UV index */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Forecasted soil moisture percentage */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Forecasted soil temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Forecasted snow depth in mm */,
  "ice_cover" REAL /* Forecasted ice cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the data is from */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data accessed */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access was successful */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather warning entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the warning is for */,
  "warning_time" TEXT /* Time the warning is issued */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of weather warning (e.g., thunderstorm, heavy rain) */,
  "warning_message" TEXT /* Message describing the warning */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the warning (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the warning */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the warning period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the warning period */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the warning is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the alert is for */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert is issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of weather alert (e.g., tornado, hurricane) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_area" TEXT /* Area affected by the alert */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the alert period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the alert period */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction (e.g., north, south) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speeds" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed */,
  "speed_value" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for wind speed (e.g., m/s, km/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud type (e.g., cumulus, stratus) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cloud type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_heights" (
  "height_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud height */,
  "height_value" REAL /* Cloud height in meters */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for cloud height (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fog_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fog type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fog type (e.g., radiation fog, advection fog) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fog type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the precipitation type (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the precipitation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
